svg.text: Runtime service topology · Event-driven · Redis Streams backbone · Async AI decoupled from signal path
market_data.tick · market_data.candle · features.technical · features.regime · features.sentiment · signal.strategy · signal.score · signal.confidence
signal.risk.approved · signal.risk.rejected · order.submitted · order.filled · order.rejected · position.opened · risk.limit.breached · system.kill_switch · system.heartbeat
Momentum · Breakout · Trend Following · OI Analysis · VWAP Analysis → IStrategy.evaluate()
features.technical.computed · features.regime.detected · signal.strategy.evaluated → consumed from Event Bus
All inter-service communication via Event Bus · Dashed lines = async · Solid lines = sync or event-driven
Risk Engine is the only component that can activate Kill Switch automatically · OMS is single consumer of signal.risk.approved
